name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
Tick tock.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1496%2E150750%2EeW8SES)

**Three** days until our critical end-of-month deadline.
**Two** of our opponents are hosting high-dollar fundraisers today.
**One** campaign can say it’s raising more money from small-dollar donations faster than probably anyone has before.
**That’s us.** You, Bernie, and hundreds of thousands of other people who want to transform our country — doing the unprecedented together.
**Time is running out** for our big deadline this week. We’re turning to you to meet the challenges ahead of our campaign. Can you help Bernie?
[**Please contribute $3 before our deadline and we’ll immediately put your contribution to work to win this election.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190529-2-45&t=26&akid=1496%2E150750%2EeW8SES)
**Thank you** for being a part of this movement.
In solidarity,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1496%2E150750%2EeW8SES). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=28&akid=1496%2E150750%2EeW8SES). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=1496_150750_eW8SES&akid=1496%2E150750%2EeW8SES).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=30&akid=1496%2E150750%2EeW8SES).

name: Cory Booker HQ
subject: What this new DNC rule means for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- Let's talk about what the new DNC debate threshold of 130,000 donors means for our campaign. It's an incredibly high bar for anybody to meet. Essentially, a handful of frontrunners -- many of whom came into this race with huge fundraising advantages -- are _already_ qualified under the new rule. For candidates like Cory Booker, as a lot of observers have noted, there's a very real chance of falling short. **We need your help -- no matter whether you 're all in for Cory or just think his voice is important to the national conversation.** [**_If you think Cory Booker belongs on that debate stage, will you chip in -- even just $1 -- right now?_**](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190529-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190529_CBHQ_20190529-fr-CBHQ-dnckick1-actives_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Today, Cory called for impeachment proceedings to begin immediately. He's one of only a handful of Democrats running for president to do so. This is a moment where our party needs voices of moral clarity and bold leadership to be part of the national conversation. From criminal justice, to environmental justice, to reproductive rights and universal health care, to income inequality and closing the racial wealth gap, Cory has been out in front, leading the way with big, progressive ideas to make people's lives better. The new DNC rule is a direct test for our campaign -- whether we pass it and secure Cory's spot on stage is up to people like you. [**_Please chip in today._**](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190529-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190529_CBHQ_20190529-fr-CBHQ-dnckick1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you, Team Cory
[](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190529-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190529_CBHQ_20190529-fr-CBHQ-dnckick1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0934/5fca0d19/3d6f61c/291b7541/3231106387/VEsD/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0934/5fca0d19/3d6f61c/291b7540/3231106387/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0934/5fca0d19/3d6f61c/291b754f/3231106387/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0934/5fca0d19/3d6f61c/291b754e/3231106387/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0934/5fca0d19/3d6f61c/291b754d/3231106387/VEsP/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0934/5fca0d19/3d6f61c/291b7541/3231106387/VEsHBQ/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Congress must begin impeachment hearings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
We cannot let this president defy the basic accountability measures built into our Constitution.
| | |
---
Peter,
**[It's time for Congress to begin impeachment hearings against President Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/support-impeachment-hearings?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&source=jtk3146-ot-gfp-nd")**
The White House has repeatedly stonewalled Congress' ability to take basic fact-finding steps and make an informed decision. And the Trump administration has completely undermined any trust the American people could have had in our Department of Justice.
Based on his statements today, Special Counsel Robert Mueller clearly expects Congress to exercise its constitutional authority and take steps he could not.
We cannot let this president defy the basic accountability measures built into our Constitution.
**[Raise your voice alongside mine today: Add your name to call for Congress to begin impeachment hearings against President Trump. The American people deserve nothing but the full truth.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/support-impeachment-hearings?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&source=jtk3146-ot-gfp-nd")**

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Why We Can’t Trust the Democrats
body:
Why We Can't Trust the Democrats No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Why We Can't Trust the Democrats](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-j/)
Democrats, mostly those running for President this time around, are saying things which ought to give voters cause to be concerned about just how far to the left they are veering. I'm on the blog discussing it today.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Are More Republicans Going to Turn on Trump?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-d/)
Over the weekend, a Republican Congressman got A LOT of attention (it wasn't me.) Justin Amash of Michigan announced that in his opinion "President Trump has engaged in impeachable conduct." I'm on the blog talking about this today.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Torture in the Modern World](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-u/)
When we hear the term "torture" we might automatically think of something that occurred in the Middle Ages, not in current times. But it still does occur today, and unfortunately, it is far too common.Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The Demonization of William Barr](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrats in Congress are on a mission. They're determined to destroy Attorney General William Barr, or at least discredit him in the eyes of the American people. I'm on the blog today discussing the reason why.Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jitudyty-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Warren 2020
subject: The truth is we're still a little short of where we need to be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Elizabeth doesn't take big checks from wealthy donors at private fundraisers. She doesn't accept any support from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, Super PACs, or PACs of any kind. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e479/45c30650/902db354/6699a226/692986801/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Here's an update for you:

Since we emailed you earlier, we've made progress toward our May fundraising goal. Thousands of people all across the country have stepped up to chip in $5, $10, or whatever they could afford to own a piece of this movement.

**But the truth is we 're still a little short of where we need to be to hit our goal before midnight Friday.

There is still to make up the difference.

[Chip in for the first time and own a piece of this campaign.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e479/45c30650/902db354/6699a229/692986801/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTI5ZW0zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190529em3-full")**

Elizabeth doesn't take big checks from wealthy donors at private fundraisers. She doesn't accept any support from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, Super PACs, or PACs of any kind.

But that means this campaign wouldn't exist without grassroots donors chipping in. And whether or not we hit our fundraising goal will have real consequences for our budget, and our movement for big, structural change.

**[Make a contribution of $3 right now and let's keep that from happening. We're hopeful we can get back on track.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e479/45c30650/902db354/6699a229/692986801/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTI5ZW0zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190529em3-full")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

body:
MaddowBlog just declared Dan's opponent the most vulnerable Senate Republican in 2020!
|
---

| | **MSNBC 's The MaddowBlog: Colorado Sen. Cory Gardner is "the Senate's most vulnerable incumbent." [Pitch in $19 before the End of Month Deadline to elect Dan, flip the Senate, and oust Mitch McConnell >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826d2/232dfd1/9367fac/62a1644c/3767504045/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190529_em_fr_b2_alert_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We just got the news:

MSNBC's MaddowBlog just declared Dan's opponent the most vulnerable Senate Republican in 2020!

Winning Colorado is our best shot in YEARS to flip the Senate -- and Dan's the most qualified candidate with the best chance to win.

Don't just take our word for it: According to Foreign Policy For America Action Network, "Dan Baer is the strongest candidate to take on Senator Cory Gardner."

But we still need to build a massive grassroots coalition to take advantage of this opportunity and WIN.

If you're sick and tired of Mitch McConnell's obstructionism. If you're ready to elect the first openly gay man to the Senate and make history. If you've got $5 or more to spare in the fight for our progressive values -- Will you join Dan's team right now?

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: What John just said on Rachel Maddow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Danielle wrote you about the importance of getting John onto the debate stage so that we can bring some Colorado common sense to Washington. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771638/691c9bd/6c1e7299/11a4f76c/1113275049/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team--this morning, Danielle wrote you about the importance of getting John onto the debate stage so that we can bring some Colorado common sense to Washington ([**_we need your help to do that --can you chip in now?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771638/691c9bd/6c1e7299/11a4f76d/1113275049/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190529_DH_20190529-fr-DH-maddowtopper-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer="))

Tonight on Rachel Maddow, John stood up unequivocally for Roe v. Wade and introduced his plan to expand Colorado's successful long-acting reversible contraception program nationally, protecting the right of all women to control their own bodies by providing universal access to affordable IUDs. In Colorado, the program led to a 64% drop in teenage abortion, a 54% drop in teenage pregnancies, and saved the state $70 million. Rachel called John "one of the most popular and accomplished governors in the country," and it's clear from those numbers why.

[**_Chip in now if you want to elect someone with a record of protecting reproductive rights, at a time when they 're under assault like never before._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771638/691c9bd/6c1e7299/11a4f76a/1113275049/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190529_DH_20190529-fr-DH-maddowtopper-ndnr_ndnr_l2&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Team Hickenlooper

\------Forwarded message------

Friend,

It's debate preparation time, and John's getting ready to share his message on stage in Miami--a message about an America that works for its workers, an America that places common-sense restrictions on deadly weapons, and an America where reproductive rights are treated as fundamental human rights.

**But earning a spot on the debate stage isn 't easy--and rightfully so. **The DNC wants campaigns to show that they have a solid base of grassroots support, as well as the resources to compete against Donald Trump's war chest.

[**_I can 't wait to watch John stand up for our values on stage--but not every candidate will have that opportunity. Please help us make sure John doesn't miss his--can you donate just $1 today?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771638/691c9bd/6c1e7299/11a4f76b/1113275049/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190529_DH_20190529-fr-DH-maddowtopper-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Danielle

Danielle Hirshberg
Deputy Digital Director
Hickenlooper 2020
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771638/691c9bd/6c1e7299/11a4f76b/1113275049/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190529_DH_20190529-fr-DH-maddowtopper-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Mike Siegel
subject: We deserve better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7136769/66724167/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2EzMzcwNi1lMjgyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qa5WmzoGuw2SMC5aST_sXwZ4ijFGCfVIoo7sgiFiqGI=)
---
Peter, Texas leads the nation in rural hospital closures with nearly 20 closing in the last 6 years. Now, a hospital in the 10th District, St. Mark’s, is in danger of closing. This hospital serves thousands of people in a rural area of this district. We are already a country with tens of millions of uninsured, with countless Americans facing crippling medical debt. And a state with sky-high maternal mortality rates, where retired teachers must choose between paying the electric bill and the hospital bill. We deserve better. The closure of St. Mark’s will put lives at risk, especially the most vulnerable members of the community. People without transportation and people with severe medical needs will suffer the most. Local residents will become more dependent on helicopter transport, and long drives as far as Austin and Houston, to obtain adequate care. That is why I am fighting to keep this hospital open. Our campaign is working on the ground to support a hospital district that will save this hospital. **[Can you help support our efforts on the ground with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7136770/66724168/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2EzMzcwNi1lMjgyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qa5WmzoGuw2SMC5aST_sXwZ4ijFGCfVIoo7sgiFiqGI=&refcode=em052919-2)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7136771/66724169/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2EzMzcwNi1lMjgyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qa5WmzoGuw2SMC5aST_sXwZ4ijFGCfVIoo7sgiFiqGI=&refcode=em052919-2) When Texas Republicans declined federal funds for Medicaid expansion, they signed a death warrant for hospitals like St. Mark’s. Those federal dollars—our federal dollars—would have guaranteed an income stream: a lifeline to keep our rural hospitals open. Health care is a human right. Without universal access to quality care, we cannot fulfill the American promise of equal opportunity and shared prosperity.

Michael McCaul has done nothing but pass the buck on healthcare and hope that someone fixes it down the road. Well, let’s give him his wish. **[Donate to our campaign today and we will replace McCaul with someone who will act now on healthcare!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7136772/66724170/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2EzMzcwNi1lMjgyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qa5WmzoGuw2SMC5aST_sXwZ4ijFGCfVIoo7sgiFiqGI=&refcode=em052919-2)** Our campaign has always been about more than just our run for Congress. We want to build a movement that helps unite the 10th District. Now, we have a unique opportunity to help our rural neighbors save their hospital, but **[we need your help!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7136773/66724171/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2EzMzcwNi1lMjgyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qa5WmzoGuw2SMC5aST_sXwZ4ijFGCfVIoo7sgiFiqGI=&refcode=em052919-2)** For the people,
Mike Siegel

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Taking a moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
Yesterday, my team reached out to you about making a donation to help us reach our critical end-of-month fundraising goal.
| | Peter,

Yesterday, my team reached out to you about making a donation to help us reach our critical end-of-month fundraising goal.

**[We're still $2,694 behind, so I'm taking a moment to personally ask if you can make a small donation of $10. Please consider making a contribution, then let me tell you why it's crucial that I have your grassroots support in my re-election race. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/RheUqbYnyj7SQiCiTSRETU_Aec8o4KKZvq9vqjsIh84=/fGpWHujo3aR8qgMv09w_g_piPDzniFVsgzg5hZ66rr0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.30_b1_as_all&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**

From day one, I centered my run for Congress on finding common ground with individuals across the political spectrum so we could make progress on the issues that affect Central Virginia families. That message resonated with voters across our district -- _and the nation_ \-- who were sick and tired of politicians who deepened partisan wounds by isolating themselves in the extreme corners of their parties.

**Their inaction hurt everyday Americans, and together, we said "_no more._ " Instead, our new generation of leaders is building bridges -- not burning them. **

I'm reaching across the aisle and finding allies who are eager to make progress on the challenges of day-to-day life. Just last week, I joined Democrats and Republicans to envision a 5G framework that will prioritize individual privacy, block national security threats, and expand high-speed internet to VA-07's rural areas.

There are countless other issues I'm confident we can find common ground on, but to do that, **we need to keep this district in the hands of voters and out of the pockets of dark money donors funding extreme ideologues.**

**[Peter -- Your grassroots support today can help us make the most of these early fundraising deadlines and put us in a strong position to cross the finish line again with a victory in hand. Will you make a donation of any size so we can raise the final $2,694 of our May goal?>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/RheUqbYnyj7SQiCiTSRETU_Aec8o4KKZvq9vqjsIh84=/fGpWHujo3aR8qgMv09w_g_piPDzniFVsgzg5hZ66rr0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.30_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)** | **[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/RheUqbYnyj7SQiCiTSRETU_Aec8o4KKZvq9vqjsIh84=/fGpWHujo3aR8qgMv09w_g_piPDzniFVsgzg5hZ66rr0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.30_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
---
Thank you so much.

_Abigail_

| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/RheUqbYnyj7SQiCiTSRETU_Aec8o4KKZvq9vqjsIh84=/pMWsrqPNvXycOQRLdDWO6HYs73Jr9V_uDm3V9_y-lRM=)

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/RheUqbYnyj7SQiCiTSRETU_Aec8o4KKZvq9vqjsIh84=/AfjvyLy8gePzYwDZWaNAK-5tSVTkg1hA2RXeeXvg7Co=) to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/RheUqbYnyj7SQiCiTSRETU_Aec8o4KKZvq9vqjsIh84=/jkW4ILx5U8vqY55orfksa5_o4x4Tt82j-UQHHw0zIS4=).

Spanberger For Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen, VA 23058

| Paid for by Spanberger For Congress

From day one, I centered my run for Congress on finding common ground with individuals across the political spectrum so we could make progress on the issues that affect Central Virginia families. That message resonated with voters across our district -- and the nation \-- who were sick and tired of politicians who deepened partisan wounds by isolating themselves in the extreme corners of their parties. Their inaction hurt everyday Americans, and together, we said "no more. " Instead, our new generation of leaders is building bridges -- not burning them. I'm reaching across the aisle and finding allies who are eager to make progress on the challenges of day-to-day life. Just last week, I joined Democrats and Republicans to envision a 5G framework that will prioritize individual privacy, block national security threats, and expand high-speed internet to VA-07's rural areas. There are countless other issues I'm confident we can find common ground on, but to do that, we need to keep this district in the hands of voters and out of the pockets of dark money donors funding extreme ideologues. | Thank you so much. Abigail | Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit = If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may = to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. Spanberger For Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 | Paid for by Spanberger For Congress

name: Robert Foster
subject: Important Deadline Day
body:
Support Robert Today
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| Tomorrow is our next important fundraising deadline. [Would you help us reach our fundraising goal today by contributing $10, $25, or whatever you can afford before tomorrow's deadline at 5pm?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eDpH4lkX4bN1Tdf2k6S2VSiJu-atTLhQ_WU7cxK_VvMFTQUjKCInd3oTZcBeW0S9vYZ03aZhz2iEzCPm7-9EbooW0RPQg8Uu_V5cJAdx_T8vFndU1Nsf2EP9-4LvPEzYaM78Fzt3fy_jaNJPaQVgbfQUqtJYapHCkwl9MOeo0f-nQ6VIhPq9lhbTju3h_mlWoJUI7WbUhZVCR3Ve-0cTRpb3ErEbiGj6&c=U2BfY2Eyc5FRS_-GBAAnkxcph-fS-heJcZE_02ijfsqfCM8XLbaw4Q==&ch=Ca6a8MggfJ_L4kjCb61KCx9r5nuszI0hhKRyVTOaC4bpgWf9n5mdAQ==)
Less than six months ago, Heather and I traded our rural, quaint life of building a business we're pretty proud of, raising two little ones, and the work that goes into farming to become Mississippi's next governor.
As we travel all corners of our great state, we are inspired more and more by the welcome and support we receive along the way and continue to be encouraged by the amount of momentum that continues to build in our campaign.
People are hungry for a change to the status quo. They are excited as we are at the opportunity for a governor with a background in business, versus a life-long political career. As a conservative outsider, I hope to bring a fresh perspective and outside-the-box thinking to our office of the governor.
My work in the private sector, ability to meet payroll in a recession, and the value I have learned by signing the front of a paycheck, has allowed me to be in touch with every day Mississippians and prepared me to lead our state as governor.
I love Mississippi and am committed to taking our state to the next level. As a tested businessman, farmer, political outsider, and a man who puts his faith in Christ, I believe I have what is needed to take our state to the next level.
But we can't do it alone. We are in a tough race and need your help. We don't have millions in special interests money. We are counting on average people to help us make this possible on August 6th, and while it's hard to ask many of you to do more, we believe this challenge is worthwhile.
Heather and I are beyond grateful for the warm welcome you have shown us since we started this campaign six months ago - my biggest challenge yet. Like so many of you, we love Mississippi and believe, with my vision and your help, we can make our state an even better place to live, start a business, hire an employee, and call home.
---
| Gratefully,
---
|
---

name: Eric Trump
subject: It’s time to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Gearing up for 2020. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=37d97daec4776d8fb347a782d7fc1f0501e4004ed82b40efd7b2226fefab7ddf3730cc49aaa14d42b219525668677c3031fde40310dceed2)

Friend,

My father is asking about you.

There have already been SO MANY American Patriots stepping up to help us during our CRITICAL End-of-Month push, but we noticed YOU haven't contributed yet.

The Liberal Mob is doing everything they can to discredit our great President, but with your help, they won't gain an ounce of momentum heading into the most important election of our lifetime.

We're still shy of our $2,000,000 goal and we need you to step up NOW to show your support.

So far in May, we have fewer gifts in the door than every other month this year.

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: The plan to win in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friends, the number one question I get asked is, "Why are you running for Congress again?" People want to know how we will close the 4.9% gap from last time and win in 2020.

I'm running again because this district desperately wants change, as we saw from the last election, when things moved rapidly in our direction. Together, our campaign made history: closing the gap with Pete Olson by 30 points from the previous midterm.

We know we can win because we already made a huge change with your help, and the help of thousands of others who want their government to be more responsive and transparent. It's clear that our community doesn't want a representative who said in 2016 that he was proud to be the most right-wing member of Congress.

Here's what we are doing differently to win in 2020: We're starting earlier, we have assembled the professional tools and infrastructure we need to win, we've started registering new voters, and our grassroots volunteer force which was already huge is growing every day. Most importantly, we've got you on our team, my friend!

Together we can flip this seat in 2020 and give the people of Texas' 22nd District the representation they deserve - someone who puts their needs first and works tirelessly to unite our communities, protect our families, and defend our values.

[**Team , the momentum is with us and I'm asking for your help to keep it growing stronger. Our end-of-month deadline is at midnight tomorrow. Can you make a grassroots contribution to make sure we hit our goal and keep building on the momentum we've started?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/f9YFqB_zy4gRwy0BObd15wFMby2NZv80R8qyYiCoAhE=/DUB02OLTpG71dcXR-dXT_H3J7v-XBNoEyYc40oaqbMI=?refcode=05302019)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/f9YFqB_zy4gRwy0BObd15wFMby2NZv80R8qyYiCoAhE=/DUB02OLTpG71dcXR-dXT_H3J7v-XBNoEyYc40oaqbMI=?refcode=05302019)

Thank you my friend!

Sri Preston Kulkarni

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/f9YFqB_zy4gRwy0BObd15wFMby2NZv80R8qyYiCoAhE=/pYmc9mIpZBnLmxqt25lw3TY0aP6z5tpc42IaVEitQKk=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/f9YFqB_zy4gRwy0BObd15wFMby2NZv80R8qyYiCoAhE=/1TTjXUIScB3_6fZ5_Af43sBN61wVyK_DwLQCxErMt-k=)

**OFFICIAL SUPPORTER RECORD**

Friend,

There are less than 48 hours left before our end-of-month deadline, and **we need your help to reach our goal before time runs out!** We have a real opportunity to build a better Mississippi for everyone by electing Jim this November, but we can't do it without your support.

Lt. Governor Tate Reeves just spent hundreds of thousands of dollars to attack Jim. But recent polling shows that when voters compare Jim's message to Reeves', Jim's lead widens -- so it's critical that we fight back!

There's too much on the line this November to let Reeves' smear attacks go unanswered. **From supporting our schools and teachers to fixing our roads and bridges** , there's so much work that needs to be done to grow our economy and put people back to work.

**Jim is ready to get to it -- but he needs your help to win this election first! With less than 48 hours before our end-of-month deadline, will you make a donation now to help us reach our $15,000 goal and fight back against Reeves' attacks?**

name: Warren HQ
subject: re: we have to ask: Can you chip in for the first time?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We still need a few more people in Pennsylvania to make a contribution so we can get back on track and hit our monthly goal before tomorrow at midnight. | | |
---
We've made good progress since we sent this email on Tuesday -- but we still need a few more people in Pennsylvania to make a contribution so we can get back on track and hit our monthly goal before tomorrow at midnight.

**[Can you make a contribution of any size and help power our grassroots campaign?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e475/45c30650/91bc65c1/6699ae6a/3644486525/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMwZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190530em1-full")**

Thanks.

Team Warren
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e475/45c30650/91bc65c1/6699ae6a/3644486525/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMwZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190530em1-full")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **ElizabethWarren.com** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Tue, May 28, 2019
Subject: we have to ask: Can you chip in for the first time?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
We only have a few days left to hit our May fundraising goal -- and as of this morning, we're behind where we need to be.

This is important. Meeting our goal before this deadline will ensure we're able to grow this movement, increase the number of states we're organizing in, and share the big ideas to get our country working for working people again.

**But even though the pressure is high, you won 't see Elizabeth hopping around big cities to host swanky fundraisers with wealthy donors behind closed doors.**

You won't see Elizabeth take a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. You won't see Elizabeth cozy up to billionaires and nudge them to dump buckets of cash into a Super PAC for her.

**Instead, grassroots donors are the only people who fund our campaign. And right now, our movement needs your help.

[Can you make a $3 contribution to help hit our goal? Every new contribution that comes in will help our campaign get back on track to hitting this important May fundraising goal.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e475/45c30650/91bc65c1/6699ae6a/3644486525/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMwZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190530em1-full")**

Hitting this fundraising goal is just the first step of our plan to put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs -- not in the clutches of the rich and powerful.

We're proposing big plan after big plan to make big, structural change -- the type of change that rips out the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

Because let's face it: There are systemic problems that led to someone like Donald Trump getting elected in the first place. He's only the symptom, not the cause, of the crises we face.

To make real change, we need to build a massive grassroots movement, and we need bold ideas.

That's what we're focused on.

So instead of catering to wealthy and well-connected donors, Elizabeth will continue to spend time at meet and greets and organizing events. And she'll keep proposing substantive ideas that will level the playing field for working people.

Elizabeth's time is not for sale, and she's running to be the best president that money can't buy. But that's only possible because of the support from people like you.

**[So we have to ask: Can you chip in for the first time? Help hit our May fundraising goal so we can continue to grow this movement the right way.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e475/45c30650/91bc65c1/6699ae6a/3644486525/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMwZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190530em1-full")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e475/45c30650/91bc65c1/6699ae6a/3644486525/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMwZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190530em1-full")

name: Jason Yates
subject: SURVEY: Do you support the Alabama Human Life Protection Act?
body:
| | Christians are divided on this issue.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0Rh1dmBDNYWxs4Gmryp_voYaDCvHHvb8zPr61XzLS6U_aSrKc-0rZUFopn2RKRt5N294055CPh2JU_xh2nyOODHExEmrY7E1tnlELFMaMxx4K&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190530srv01&n=1)
| Peter, Just a couple of weeks ago the Alabama governor signed into law the “Human Life Protection Act,” one of the strongest pro-life laws in the nation. The law makes both abortion and attempted abortion a felony offense in the state of Alabama. Although the law “would provide that a woman who receives an abortion will not be held criminally culpable or civilly liable for receiving the abortion,” the doctor committing the abortion would be held criminally liable. Legislators hope this law will pose a direct challenge to Roe v. Wade and eventually be considered by the Supreme Court to overturn this abortion precedent. Christian leaders across the nation are reacting to the law, some in support of Alabama’s attempt at challenging Roe v. Wade and others opposed because they believe the law goes too far by criminalizing all abortion. We want to know what you think. Please take our one-question survey. **Do you support the Alabama Human Life Protection Act?** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0Rh1dmBDNYWxs4Gmryp_voYaDCvHHvb8zPr61XzLS6U_aSrKc-0rZUFopn2RKRt5N294055CPh2JU_xh2nyOODHHLjQu1ZFOQJykn8b81HA0XF9kO-tDeNoPkjbzGPTP2Xkbjj1d6IkpPN6DHZcLJeWzvMuYUa11IAfZFAVABKUvQ9tmhgZ_Hv4Pwuw-1bTpq4g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190530srv01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0Rh1dmBDNYWxs4Gmryp_voYaDCvHHvb8zPr61XzLS6U_aSrKc-0rZUFopn2RKRt5N294055CPh2JU_xh2nyOODHHLjQu1ZFOQJykn8b81HA0XF9kO-tDeNoPkjbzGPTP2Xkbjj1d6IkpPN6DHZcLJeWw88nK31M8mSDMHdwNpMqOQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190530srv01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190530srv01&n=4)
---

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190530srv01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190530srv01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190530srv01&n=8)

body:
I'm sorry to bother you, but it looks like you have not made your first donation to Joe Biden quite yet! | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bf3/1cd0ac28/2294c251/356c85ea/3638355754/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")

Peter, I'm sorry to bother you, but it looks like you have not made your first donation to Joe Biden quite yet!

I wanted to take a moment to write you and say if you have been waiting to donate to Joe Biden's campaign, I hope you do it today. [Our end-of-month deadline is 24 hours away and we still need 3,500 donations or we will fall short of our goal.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bf3/1cd0ac28/2294c251/356c85e9/3638355754/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190530nondonor-b1_FDR_sendwide_NA-F2_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190530nondonor&utm_content=b1_FDR_sendwide_NA&utm_term=F2_S1_C1&amount=25")

If you still need more convincing, I understand. Read below and I'll try and make the case on why you should chip in at least $1 today.
* **First** , we get that it's early and there are a lot of candidates vying for the Democratic nomination. A competitive primary is important to our party! We look forward to debating policy ideas and your $1 will get our ideas in front of more Americans.
* **Second** , we only launched a month ago. We need the resources to have more conversations all over the country so that we can best represent all people when we take the debate stage next month.
* **Third** , you may have seen, Donald Trump has taken a particular interest in our campaign and Joe Biden. Your donation goes towards building a strong campaign and standing up to Trump.

**So will you join hundreds of thousands of supporters and make your first donation to Joe Biden 's campaign?**

name: Joshua Mahony
subject: I'm Running
body:
Friend,
This is important. For the last 5 years, Arkansas has put it's faith in Tom Cotton's leadership, and in return, Senator Cotton has sold us out to special interests, lobbyists, political action committees and beltway insiders. It's been hard to watch as he has allowed this trade war to decimate our family farms, voted to strip healthcare away from Arkansans with pre-existing conditions, supported giving tax breaks to the wealthiest in America while leaving the rest of us to foot the bill and while doing so, not even bothering to show up in Arkansas. That's not why we sent Tom Cotton to Washington.
[**We deserve better than the leadership we are getting. That's why I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. Our state and it's people deserve a Senator that puts Arkansas first. And that's what I plan to do.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7146892/66804670/-347867019?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDUxZmVmYy0wNzgzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W40NyyCxnfyatIjl7D7OPvY7JJ6M8CRVgjB4DK6tQ3s=)
We have an opportunity to transform our state and country and get back on the right track. It's time to focus on making healthcare affordable for every Arkansan and American; It's time to make investments in our infrastructure so that our companies and their workers can flourish; It's time to ensure that higher education isn't a path to bankruptcy; It's time to fight for a fair tax system that values hard work just as much as it rewards wealth; It's time we look at what have in common and not what divides us.
I cannot do this alone though. Senator Cotton has the special interests and big money donors to fund his campaign. _**I need you and other grassroots donors to step up and fight alongside of me for our future.**_

She's championing the fight to hold this President accountable -- but she badly needs support in the Senate. "" Thank you, Ben Ray \-- Forwarded Message -- I've always been direct with you, so I'll just come out and say it: "" I watched Ben Ray lead the charge to take back the House last year. I mean it when I say Democrats would not be in the Majority without him. I know he 's Democrats' best chance at winning the Senate, too -- which is why I'm throwing all the support I can behind him. But Trump's hand-picked puppet has jumped into the race to defeat Ben Ray. So I'm asking for a MASSIVE surge of support on his behalf -- 5,000 gifts before his first end-of-month deadline in 24 hours. Can I count on your $15? | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Nancy Pelosi | "" "" "" People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 "" | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: Georgia must do better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header]
Trust women. Stop the bans. Donate today.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em053019]

Dear Friend –

For women in Georgia, the threat of the abortion ban is at the forefront of our thoughts. And similar bans are spreading like wildfire across the country. Just today, Louisiana passed yet another draconian ban. Missouri is on the verge of becoming the first state in the union with no abortion providers whatsoever. It’s appalling.

Teresa’s message is simple: Trust women. Stop the bans.

And if politicians fail to trust women with this most personal decision, we will not trust them to hold elected office.

As Senator, Teresa will vote against any Supreme Court nominee who will not uphold Roe v. Wade. Chip in now, and let’s win this campaign for our rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em053019]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express Donate $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em053019&amount=3&express_lane=true]

Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em053019&amount=10&express_lane=true]

Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em053019&amount=25&express_lane=true]

Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em053019&amount=50&express_lane=true]

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em053019]

The battleground for protecting our reproductive rights is the U.S. Senate – and the road to control of the Senate runs right through Georgia. That’s why it’s so important for us to support Teresa in her campaign for office.

Roe v. Wade has been the law of the land for nearly 50 years – we cannot go back. We’ve seen the devastation and the danger that comes when women and their doctors are criminalized for their constitutional right to make healthcare decisions that are right for them.

Georgia needs a Senator who will fight back in the war on women. Donate now to support Teresa as she stands up for women across our state and country. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em053019]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em053019&noskip=true]

It’s a long fight ahead and we’re glad to have you on our team. Your support today will make sure Teresa has what it takes to mount a strong campaign – a campaign we cannot afford to lose.

With you,
Team Tomlinson

| **Senator Jon Morgan and his Senate Democrat colleagues are playing political games and holding up critical funding that protects our children. It has been four weeks since Senate Bill 6 cleared the legislative process, but it has yet to be sent to the Governor's desk for his signature.** **Senator Morgan is delaying Senate Bill 6 for purely partisan political reasons and is holding up the hiring of 77 additional child protective service workers for DCYF. ** **In Senator Morgan's own words,["we need to put partisan politics aside and finally fully fund caseworker positions at DCYF. It’s time to pass Senate Bill 6."](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xMTY3Mzc4ODQwNTUzNTI2NzMzJmM9cTluMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTM2ODU3NTImZD13NnU3eTJn.gV0_hhGYF-KnZ7HVcfDWAYeLFuPBdgKaPbFSMyh2Ygo) ** **The NHGOP is marking the time the bill has spent in legislative limbo on[our website](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xMTY3Mzc4ODQwNTUzNTI2NzMzJmM9cTluMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTM2ODU3NTQmZD1tMHkwdzZm.G1SgN6waIN5aFJw7iWRUS-dW3LE2hEPkDWqJSJJES-k), and we are calling on Senator Morgan to stop playing political games with Granite State children and get Senate Bill 6 to the Governor’s desk.** **\- Team NHGOP**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Start impeachment inquiry now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
After Robert Mueller's press conference, there's no debate: We must take the investigation into the president's dealings with Russia to the next level. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377163d/691c9bd/6c127b73/11a4ea17/4221557658/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

After Robert Mueller's press conference yesterday, there's no debate: We must take the investigation into the president's dealings with Russia to the next level--by starting impeachment inquiry now.

I'm ready to say this loud and clear on the debate stage--**but to guarantee my spot, I need folks like you to give just $1 to our campaign. Can you make your first gift now?** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377163d/691c9bd/6c127b73/11a4ea14/4221557658/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachment-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377163d/691c9bd/6c127b73/11a4ea15/4221557658/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachment-ndnr_ndnr_b5&recurring=auto&amount=5&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377163d/691c9bd/6c127b73/11a4ea12/4221557658/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachment-ndnr_ndnr_b25&recurring=auto&amount=25&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377163d/691c9bd/6c127b73/11a4ea13/4221557658/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachment-ndnr_ndnr_b50&recurring=auto&amount=50&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377163d/691c9bd/6c127b73/11a4ea10/4221557658/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachment-ndnr_ndnr_b100&recurring=auto&amount=100&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377163d/691c9bd/6c127b73/11a4ea11/4221557658/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachment-ndnr_ndnr_bother&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I didn't jump to this conclusion quickly--I've always said I wanted to hear what Robert Mueller had to say first. And yesterday, we watched him _refuse_ to clear Donald Trump of the very serious allegations he faces.

Today on CNN New Day I emphasized this: Congress has a clear responsibility to act. We cannot leave unanswered the question of whether or not the President of the United States committed a crime.

[**_Chip in to help us build a campaign ready and determined to seek justice for our nation._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377163d/691c9bd/6c127b73/11a4ea0e/4221557658/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachment-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377163d/691c9bd/6c127b73/11a4ea0f/4221557658/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachment-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Team Ed Markey
subject: A thorn in President Trump's side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

From day one of Donald Trump's administration, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Champions like Ed.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And just this week, when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

**Team: we NEED to keep Ed in the Senate to stand up for us against President Trump 's agenda.**

Ed is a thorn in President Trump's side, and if he's going to continue sticking it to Trump, then we must reach our goal before the end of the month.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Democrats Should Forget Impeachment and Turn the Page
body:
"It would be divisive for the nation and a boon to our global competitors if Democrats choose to hobble our national agenda with superfluous..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4e7ab4445&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Democrats Should Forget Impeachment and Turn the Page**

“It would be divisive for the nation and a boon to our global competitors if Democrats choose to hobble our national agenda with superfluous, partisan impeachment,” Carrie Sheffield writes in CNN. “Clearly, Mueller is moving on and it's time for us to move on as a country, too.”

Despite the spin from Congressional Democrats looking for cover to pursue more political, obstructionist investigations, “special counsel Robert Mueller was not secretly gunning for impeachment in his statement on Wednesday . . . By a nearly 20-point margin, the American people do not want impeachment, according to polling by the Washington Post and ABC News. Let's move on and focus on issues that actually help the country, like opioid crisis alleviation, national security, infrastructure and health care.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=730fda5f9a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Mr. Mueller’s analysis of the obstruction evidence in his own report makes clear that no investigation was obstructed. Not the FBI’s counterintelligence probe, and not his own. No witnesses were interfered with, and Mr. Mueller was allowed over two years to issue nearly 500 search-and-seizure warrants and interview anyone he wanted, including anyone in the White House,” _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=522719e118&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. The report also “shows beyond doubt, there is no evidence of a conspiracy, broad or narrow.”
---
|
---
| Robert Mueller’s “message was another disappointment for Democrats, since it boils down to: I’m not going to help you drag this out,” the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=806b80e76d&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “Nothing changed after Mueller’s press conference. Except this: Democrats can’t have it both ways — shying from impeachment but wallowing in endless investigations and testimony that create more noise without shedding any new light.”
---
|
---
| “Luckily for American agriculture, President Trump negotiated a new trade agreement with Canada and Mexico called the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement, commonly referred to as the USMCA, which will help agriculture immensely,” state agriculture officials Chris Chinn, Steve Wellman, and Mike Naig write in _[The Missouri Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7ee3e0828d&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Across the country and all industry sectors, the USMCA will create roughly 176,000 jobs and inject more than $68 billion into the economy by increasing exports to Canada and Mexico.”
---
|
---
| “Everyone is curious about how such false information could have been pushed up the Obama administration’s chain of command to start a secret examination of a rival political campaign. The Democrats seem curiously uncurious to get to the bottom of the mystery,” _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1abe392210&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=874c67413b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1cd8b63f79&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4c1b515def)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Not the FBI’s counterintelligence probe, and not his own. No witnesses were interfered with, and Mr. Mueller was allowed over two years to issue nearly 500 search-and-seizure warrants and interview anyone he wanted, including anyone in the White House,” editorial board writes. The report also “shows beyond doubt, there is no evidence of a conspiracy, broad or narrow.” | | Robert Mueller’s “message was another disappointment for Democrats, since it boils down to: I’m not going to help you drag this out,” the editorial board writes. “Nothing changed after Mueller’s press conference. Except this: Democrats can’t have it both ways — shying from impeachment but wallowing in endless investigations and testimony that create more noise without shedding any new light.” | | “Luckily for American agriculture, President Trump negotiated a new trade agreement with Canada and Mexico called the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement, commonly referred to as the USMCA, which will help agriculture immensely,” state agriculture officials Chris Chinn, Steve Wellman, and Mike Naig write in . “Across the country and all industry sectors, the USMCA will create roughly 176,000 jobs and inject more than $68 billion into the economy by increasing exports to Canada and Mexico.” | | “Everyone is curious about how such false information could have been pushed up the Obama administration’s chain of command to start a secret examination of a rival political campaign. The Democrats seem curiously uncurious to get to the bottom of the mystery,” editorial board writes. | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Gavrie, Team Gillibrand
subject: Hi!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
I wanted to double-check something:
| | |
---
Hi Peter! I wanted to double-check something: We need to add 700 new members today if we want to hit our $125,000 end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight on Friday, and it looks like you haven't made a donation to our campaign yet. We need your help to close the gap before time runs out. **[Make your first donation right now to become a member--even $1 or $5 does it--to help us hit our May end-of-month goal so we can guarantee Kirsten's spot on the debate stage and build the strongest campaign possible.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97748d/2ae112ef/6916f15e/357c9ea1/694232292/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctbWF5LWVvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzEyMS1mci1nZnAtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3121-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Kirsten is committed to building a campaign as transparent and accountable as the administration she'll build in the White House.
She believes dark money and corruption is at the root of almost all of Washington's so-called "unsolvable" problems, like taking action on climate change, passing comprehensive gun reform and expanding access to affordable, comprehensive health care.
That's why we're not taking money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or fossil fuel executives in this campaign, and we don't have an individual super PAC--we're going to keep fighting for the progressive issues that matter without ever compromising on our values.
Sound like a campaign you want to be a part of? **Donate right now to become one of the 700 new members we need today, help guarantee Kirsten 's spot on the debate stage and help hit our end-of-month goal:**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I want to tell you a story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=1) Hello all and thank you for your support! I hope you had a wonderful holiday weekend. It’s been a busy week in the press for our campaign. In addition to the recent [Politico profile](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=ByhkdA7RrYhHtdiUMWUYvHc-3cCJSspB7rrpwwFiDzjlKjJaXff5yndG66GEhel8-hjbJbMGxaCC-BzKuBJO-vmOl1xptVDh7nDQbRUNoj4&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=2 "Is Andrew Yang
for Real?") and [CNN putting me in its top 10](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzunbkF-Fy8jFos4dRqtIfN3&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=3 "ActBlue CNN Page"), [TIME did a profile on my campaign](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=3nQtyGU6AIRwl-oCWnvkkx-dZOyWZCZup0De4GfdyFVky8pWuNEK8xReTXEMcBkbpWBogUQJNptTd6qDgeDBkA&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=4), and [VICE News also did a story on me](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRb_9VnMc08pSwLHlygBB2Hs&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=5 "Andrew Yang Wants To Give You $1,000 A Month \(HBO\)"), which you can watch on HBO. It’s a great reason to keep your subscription post-Game of Thrones. I wanted to share a story with you from a supporter. I believe it is stories like this one that are the reason we are seeing our campaign grow at such a rapid pace: _I am 51 years old and have never voted. Me and my husband only receive $520 each per month on SSI and only $89 in SNAP. We have two twin sons that live with us. We recently moved into a home that was rented to us by someone who didn't own the property. Now we are being forced out on the streets by the owner. But I am a fighter and will continue to do what I need for my family, I never met any candidate that was as honest and caring for people as I have seen in Andrew Yang and know from the bottom of my heart that he is the one that we need as President. We may not have much, but I try to donate as much as I can to help get him in the office. I know that Yang is our only hope for our future. I have committed myself to do whatever I can to get Andrew Yang to be our next President._ This campaign is doing so well because we are the only campaign talking about the big problems facing us as our economy transforms underneath our feet. We are talking about a future where families do not have to feel stuck in place or hopeless. They do not have to live with an economic boot on their necks. Our success is also because we are powered by YOU—our average donation is only around $22 per person. We don’t take any corporate PAC money. We are slowly moving up in the polls and name recognition but we still have a long way to go. [**Make a $5 contribution today and not only can we compete in states like Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, but we can take our message all the way to Washington when we win this entire election.**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jUkDf0yk_Fhlaffi-2uHGZMy7vA0I2giwH01G63GTJD1oVi0U1fdV24kURP2poEx5LKf2OQGIuhJZD9-AXMquRcqQzfE6SBW6K1TAvi18aYhex_iIFXgBy5fxMLi6dHOwA&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=6 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") While other politicians in the field are offering 20th century solutions to 21st century problems, we know the reality. Automation is threatening over 20-30% of all American jobs in the next 11 years, and 90%+ of jobs created in the past decade are temporary, gig, or contract jobs, with no benefits or security. Our government is dangerously behind the curve at dealing with emerging technologies and their impact on our way of life. We are taking a bold and innovative approach to the way we want to fix the problems facing this country, and I could not be more proud of the way we are doing it. I have another story I want you to read—because it is the future of many American workers whether they realize it yet or not: _I'm a college educated, 40+, single, underpaid admin worker living in Seattle. My skill set will eventually become automated, and I have no real means or desire to get a graduate degree at this point to compete with younger generations, and I don't want the debt of school weighing on me. I see the donations as an investment in my future; it feels pretty bleak otherwise. As someone who feels largely ignored by other candidates, I'm supporting Andrew Yang, whose Freedom Dividend will help everyone._ When we started this race, we were called a ‘longer-than-long-shot’ campaign. Well, this longer-than-long-shot has qualified for the first Democratic debates in June and July and is on pace to qualify for the Fall debates while sitting Representatives and Senators are still struggling to find their place on stage. It’s safe to say we’re competing. And it’s all because of you. It’s why my name recognition is increasing in early primary states. It’s why the media is finally paying attention. It’s why we are going to qualify for the debates and why we are going to continue talking about the issues that politicians are too afraid to talk about. [**Make a $5 contribution today and let’s keep gaining momentum.**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jUkDf0yk_Fhlaffi-2uHGZMy7vA0I2giwH01G63GTJD1oVi0U1fdV24kURP2poEx5LKf2OQGIuhJZD9-AXMquRcqQzfE6SBW6K1TAvi18aYhH6q3959mWw0vWTIMghJeDeXHFbPAGurhqRNwmfCmgQs&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=7 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") We can win in 2020. But we have to push to make sure it happens. With your help, we can make the case for a new vision for our country and take it all the way to the White House in 2020. Your grateful candidate, -Andrew
---

[ DONATE $10](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jXS7z6B0vQBSFYMqiqGORLM&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=8)

[ DONATE $20](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jdWXtiYd7YoTmFcK-0i3r20&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=9)

[ DONATE $50](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jaBNWLsD3frblJj2FiCYkZw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=10)

**Can you make a donation today?**

Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.

**Join the Yang Gang!**

If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application [here](https://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=11) and someone from our team will reach out.

|
---
Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality.

[Yang2020.com](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=c5dAo5qulKAncvNYjq2uGSZwl_jDGybFpG2O3zBACL4&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=12) | [Twitter](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TqE6xdNTSVfW5RhtXxhMjJ0&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=13) | [Facebook](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iem_nK8ycftXP-O5PmREpZFFJK2fNzInyXSvMk1KZmg&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=14) | [Instagram](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y48vYg4fs9ZaLi2ukqvLwvJQL5wg0UiTTe5otEcf4_Y3&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=15)

Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang.

All rights reserved.
New York, NY
#HumanityFirst

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://my.yang2020.com/unsubscribe?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_newsletter_2&n=16).
---

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: A quick note about our fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1501%2E150750%2E5VBNwG)

Really quick, before the day gets away:
Tomorrow at midnight we face an end-of-month fundraising deadline. Here's why this one is so important:
* This is the last deadline before Bernie heads to the debate stage in June, which will be a critical moment for our campaign.
* Every donation made before midnight tomorrow sends an unmistakable message about the strength of our movement.
* Our average donation this month is around $16 – which means we must receive 175 donations for every $2,800 max-out check cashed by one of our opponents in order for us to keep up.

We can only win if we're in this together. That's why we're asking you directly:
[ **Chip in $3 before tomorrow's deadline and together we are going to win this primary, defeat Trump, and transform our country.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190530-1-45&t=26&akid=1501%2E150750%2E5VBNwG)**
The way we are funding this campaign is unlike a lot of other candidates in this race. And that is why donations made in response to emails like this one are so important to our success.
Thanks for adding a contribution to stand with Bernie.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190530-1-45&t=27&akid=1501%2E150750%2E5VBNwG)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1501%2E150750%2E5VBNwG). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1501%2E150750%2E5VBNwG). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1501_150750_5VBNwG&akid=1501%2E150750%2E5VBNwG).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=31&akid=1501%2E150750%2E5VBNwG).

And that is why donations made in response to emails like this one are so important to our success. Thanks for adding a contribution to stand with Bernie. In solidarity, Team Bernie Paid for by Bernie 2020 PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

subject: Mitch McConnell's Super PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
This campaign is less than three weeks old, and Mitch McConnell is already running scared.
His Super PAC just launched TV ads in Montana--the surest sign yet that he knows our opponent, Steve Daines, is vulnerable and that our state will be a critical battleground in the 2020 election.
[**I don 't have Super PACs and Washington politicians to bankroll me like my opponent, but I do have grassroots supporters like you--and I'm proud of it. Can you contribute $5 right now?**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190530&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
I believe the people of Montana deserve leaders who will fight for them. That's why I'm in this race. And that's why Mitch McConnell is so worried--because we are in this fight to win.
The GOP will spend unlimited amounts of money to reelect my opponent and keep a puppet for their agenda in the Senate. I need you standing with me now so I have the chance to fight back.
[**Let 's show Mitch McConnell he's right to be scared. Stand with me and chip in $5 now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190530&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot

#
David and I are humbled to have you on this journey with us. We defied the odds in 2014. Together, we can defy the odds again.

**Tomorrow is our most critical fundraising deadline so far. We're still falling short and time is running out.

[Will you chip in whatever you can afford right now to help us hit our goal? ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0af09a4d8a&e=02cd889ad3)**

David is working with President Trump to successfully change the direction of our country. That makes him a top target. **Radical Democrats are __already__ running attack ads against David. **They know that if they win Georgia, they win the White House and U.S. Senate.

We have to hit our early fundraising goals so that we can respond. [**That's why I'm asking you to consider giving whatever you can afford to help us meet this critical deadline.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=303123937a&e=02cd889ad3)

David is fighting for Georgians every single day. **I’m counting on you to stand with him now. **Democrats are looking for any sign of weakness, so we simply can't afford to miss this month's goal.

[**Please, chip in right now before it's too late.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f2d5cfc8b2&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

Bonnie Perdue

| | |
---

| | I asked.
My brother, Joaquin asked.
My mom, Rosie asked.
My wife, Erica asked.

Now I'm asking again. _[**Because I just learned I need 130,000 donations to qualify for the September debate. I 'd be so grateful for your $15 before my 24-hour deadline -- for the first time ever, your generous gift will be matched. >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd39/3eb3e2fc/4037c493/74497563/762915927/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190530_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")_

Growing up on the West Side of San Antonio, I learned quickly that nothing was going to be handed to me.

The odds were stacked against people like me -- I had to work harder, smarter, and tougher than most to beat those odds.

I've worked hard for everything I've ever earned -- **and I fully plan to earn your support and my spot on that debate stage.

**Honestly though, I won 't make it without you -- but thankfully, a generous group of donors has agreed to match your contribution until my End of Month Deadline.****
I have so much more to share with the American people. clean_body: | | | | | "" | | I asked. My brother, Joaquin asked. My mom, Rosie asked. My wife, Erica asked. Now I'm asking again. "" Growing up on the West Side of San Antonio, I learned quickly that nothing was going to be handed to me. The odds were stacked against people like me -- I had to work harder, smarter, and tougher than most to beat those odds. I've worked hard for everything I've ever earned -- and I fully plan to earn your support and my spot on that debate stage. Honestly though, I won 't make it without you -- but thankfully, a generous group of donors has agreed to match your contribution until my End of Month Deadline.** I have so much more to share with the American people. I'd be incredibly grateful for your $15 to help me do it. | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you so much, Julian ** | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.
