---
Elizabeth has a plan to guarantee Universal Child Care and early education.

Now, we've got a new tool to show what her plan would mean for you.

**[Try our new calculator to see what your family would pay for child care under Elizabeth's plan.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5ab/45c30650/919fd05d/669856e2/1497179575/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJjaGlsZGNhbC0yMDE5MDUzMGVtMi12MXMyIn0=/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/kids?source=childcal-20190530em2-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

For decades, the cost of child care has climbed up and up. In most states, it costs more than in-state college tuition.

That means too many working families are left without any high-quality options that fit their budgets.

But Elizabeth has a plan for high-quality child care and early education from birth to school age that is free for millions of families and affordable for all.

It would change the lives of millions of people across the country.

They wouldn't be held back from finishing their education, starting new jobs, or anything else. They wouldn't have to worry about their kids not getting enriching, educational experiences at child care.

Elizabeth's plan is fully funded -- and then some -- by her Ultra-Millionaire Tax.

We can get this done, and make the big, structural changes we need for an economy that actually works for working people.

**[Use our new online tool to find out how Elizabeth's plan for Universal Child Care and early education would help your family. And share this link to get the word out.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5ab/45c30650/919fd05d/669856e2/1497179575/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJjaGlsZGNhbC0yMDE5MDUzMGVtMi12MXMyIn0=/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/kids?source=childcal-20190530em2-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: update on my friend Jeanne Shaheen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
My friend Senator Jeanne Shaheen really needs your help.
If Jeanne loses her reelection, it would mean handing the GOP Senate control for another two years -- no ifs ands or buts about it.
I'm asking you personally to get involved in this fight to protect New Hampshire's other Democratic Senate seat because with the future of the Supreme Court, access to affordable health care, and basic voting rights on the line, we can't afford for you to sit this one out.
[**I told Jeanne that we could help her give her campaign a boost, and $3 or more from you would make a huge impact. She 's relying on you, so will you please give what you can right now?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc2d6/2a380d31/3971e61f/f1264d/65653390/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA1MjlfMDUwOE1XSDRDSlMyLXJzX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190529_0508MWH4CJS2-rs_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

If Jeanne loses her reelection, it would mean handing the GOP Senate control for another two years -- no ifs ands or buts about it. I'm asking you personally to get involved in this fight to protect New Hampshire's other Democratic Senate seat because with the future of the Supreme Court, access to affordable health care, and basic voting rights on the line, we can't afford for you to sit this one out. "" New Hampshire is a very purple state and Republicans see Jeanne's seat as a top pick-up opportunity. As of this week, they've spent more to defeat her than all the other in-cycle Democrats combined. We CAN protect Jeanne but with far-right Republicans laser-focused on defeating her, we can't get complacent. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Get to the truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

More than a year ago, a conservative radio host in Lubbock, Texas asked me
if I would vote for impeachment. Knowing that it might not be the most
popular answer in my home state of Texas, I said yes. It was clear to me
then, as it is now, that the future of our democracy is at stake.

Robert Mueller just made it crystal clear. Of the hundreds of pages in his
special counsel report, he chose to highlight both the obstruction of
justice and calculated attacks on our democracy by Russia. He said
something important: when the subject of an investigation obstructs that
inquiry, or lies to investigators, it strikes at the very core of our
government's ability to get to the truth and hold people accountable.

His message was clear. If we want to prevent this from happening again, we
must hold those responsible to account. The only way we can do that is for
Congress to meet this moment and begin impeachment proceedings.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/start-impeachment-proceedings/?source=ema20190530-33567&t=1001&akid=33567%2E444211%2EYx5MY1 ]Add your name if you agree it’s time to begin impeachment proceedings
so we can get to the truth and hold perpetrators accountable.

This systematic attack by Russia on our democracy demands the attention of
every American, and the only way every American can be represented
properly is through the House of Representatives. If ever there were a
moment to act, it is now. If Congress fails to do that, we have set the
precedent that some people are above the law in this country.

I believe those members of Congress who listen to the courage of their
convictions at this moment of truth will be rewarded by the judgment of
history. While we still can, we must hold the president accountable for
his blatant obstruction of justice and lies to investigators.

This is not about me running for president. It’s not something I take
lightly. It’s more important than any one election or one presidency. The
sanctity of our democracy is at stake, and we don’t have much time.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/start-impeachment-proceedings/?source=ema20190530-33567&t=1002&akid=33567%2E444211%2EYx5MY1 ]I hope you’ll join me in adding your name today to call on Congress to
begin impeachment proceedings.

Sincerely,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20190530-33567&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=33567%2E444211%2EYx5MY1 ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190530footer&t=1004&refcode2=33567_444211_Yx5MY1&akid=33567%2E444211%2EYx5MY1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=33567%2E444211%2EYx5MY1

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: On impeachment:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
After Robert Mueller's press conference, there's no debate: We must take the investigation into the president's dealings with Russia to the next level. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771633/691c9bd/6c171036/11a4e882/3780301188/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

After Robert Mueller's press conference yesterday, there's no debate: We must take the investigation into the president's dealings with Russia to the next level--by starting impeachment inquiry now.

I'm ready to say this loud and clear on the debate stage--**but to guarantee my spot, I need folks like you to give just $1 to our campaign. Can you make your first gift now?** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771633/691c9bd/6c171036/11a4e883/3780301188/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachmentbump-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771633/691c9bd/6c171036/11a4e880/3780301188/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachmentbump-ndnr_ndnr_b5&recurring=auto&amount=5&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771633/691c9bd/6c171036/11a4e881/3780301188/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachmentbump-ndnr_ndnr_b25&recurring=auto&amount=25&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771633/691c9bd/6c171036/11a4e8be/3780301188/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachmentbump-ndnr_ndnr_b50&recurring=auto&amount=50&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771633/691c9bd/6c171036/11a4e8bf/3780301188/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachmentbump-ndnr_ndnr_b100&recurring=auto&amount=100&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771633/691c9bd/6c171036/11a4e8bc/3780301188/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachmentbump-ndnr_ndnr_bother&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I didn't jump to this conclusion quickly--I've always said I wanted to hear what Robert Mueller had to say first. And yesterday, we watched him _refuse_ to clear Donald Trump of the very serious allegations he faces.

Today on CNN New Day I emphasized this: Congress has a clear responsibility to act. We cannot leave unanswered the question of whether or not the President of the United States committed a crime.

[**_Chip in to help us build a campaign ready and determined to seek justice for our nation._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771633/691c9bd/6c171036/11a4e8bd/3780301188/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachmentbump-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771633/691c9bd/6c171036/11a4e8ba/3780301188/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-mueller-response?refcode=em_fr_20190530_JH_20190530-fr-JH-impeachmentbump-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

**** ****

| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.

name: KEY RACE ALERT (via Team Baer)
subject: CNN's 2020 Senate prediction:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
If we don't win Dan's race in Colorado, we won't win the Senate.
|
---

| | **CNN: "A Democratic Senate majority come 2021 looks like a long-ish shot"** We'll be blunt with you. If we don't win Dan's race in Colorado, we won't win the Senate. Here's why: \-- This is one of two Senate seats held by a Republican in a state Hillary Clinton won. \-- The state shifted for Democrats in 2018. \-- CNN already reported that a loss here will put the Senate out of reach for Democrats. Foreign Policy For America Action Network just endorsed Dan and said "Dan Baer is the strongest candidate to take on Senator Cory Gardner." And we need the strongest candidate in order to win the most important race in the country, so that we can finally oust Mitch McConnell. If we don't win Dan's race in Colorado, we won't win the Senate. Here's why: \-- This is one of two Senate seats held by a Republican in a state Hillary Clinton won. \-- The state shifted for Democrats in 2018. \-- CNN already reported that a loss here will put the Senate out of reach for Democrats. The next 24 hours will set the tone for the rest of our campaign. By this time next month, we will have participated in our first debate, rolled out major policy proposals, and built out field organizing teams in key states. It's a lot to look forward to! But we have to finish May strong, if we want to fund our big plans for June.

We only have 24 hours to close the gap and collect 2,000 more donations to hit this May goal. **That means we may need people that have not donated yet to take the next step.**

[So we're asking: Can you invest in our program and solidify your standing as an early supporter? »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319408/1cd0ac28/22fb6798/356c8f50/1535152453/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190530memberbox-b2_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190530memberbox&utm_content=b2_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=25")

Thanks for being with us from the beginning!

Team Biden
|

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Donald Trump is a coward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
We deserve a president brave enough to stand up for what's right.
| | |
---
Peter, Donald Trump punches down and demeans the vulnerable. He demonizes women and people of color. He spews hate and division. He's a coward.
**We deserve better** --we deserve a president brave enough to stand up for what's right, who has the humility to admit when they're wrong and who embraces progress instead of running from it.
I'm building a campaign strong enough to make me that president because I will fight for every family as hard as I would fight for my own, and I know I can defeat Donald Trump.
**But building a campaign like that is only possible if we hit our fundraising goals, and time is running out to raise the $125,000 we need this week to stay on track.**
**Peter, there are just 24 hours left before the deadline:[**Rush a donation right now to help hit our May fundraising goal, build a campaign strong enough to defeat Donald Trump, and help guarantee my spot on the debate stage.**](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977487/2ae112ef/6924a905/357c9b28/1689828855/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctbWF5LWVvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzEyMy1nZnAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3123-gfp-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3123-gfp-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| [Donate $25](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3123-gfp-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3123-gfp-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| [Donate another amount](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977487/2ae112ef/6924a905/357c9b28/1689828855/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctbWF5LWVvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzEyMy1nZnAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3123-gfp-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
Our democracy has been taken out of the hands of the people and given over to special interests.
If you're not willing to get money out of politics and have publicly funded elections, greedy lobbyists will continue to control our lawmaking. If you're not willing to take on the drug companies, you can't solve the opioid crisis or bring down the cost of prescriptions. If you're not willing to take on the fossil fuel companies, you can't fight the effects of climate change and get to net-zero carbon emissions.
I believe that we can accomplish all this and more. And I know that years from now, we will look back on this moment in our history and be able to say we did something about it.
**If you 're with me, make a donation right now, in these last 24 hours before the deadline--every gift gets us closer to hitting our May fundraising goal, helps guarantee my spot on the Democratic debate stage, and helps me defeat Donald Trump:**
**[secure.actblue.com/donate/kg-may-eom](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977487/2ae112ef/6924a905/357c9b28/1689828855/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctbWF5LWVvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzEyMy1nZnAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3123-gfp-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Kirsten
| | [DONATE NOW](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977487/2ae112ef/6924a905/357c9b28/1689828855/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctbWF5LWVvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzEyMy1nZnAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3123-gfp-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Zach Graumann, Andrew Yang's Campaign Manager
subject: Follow-Up: Andrew Yang is everywhere!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=1) Whether it is TIME magazine, Politico, CNN, New York Times, or more, one thing is for sure: **Andrew Yang is everywhere right now.** Last year, no one believed he could win this election. Today, he’s polling above sitting mayors, senators, and governors, and our numbers are particularly high in the early primary states. **This is before most Americans are introduced to Andrew at the end of June in the first Democratic debates.** This momentum just tells us what we have known all along. We can win Iowa. We can sweep the early states. We can take this all the way to the White House. But only if we keep pushing. [**Make a $5 contribution today and help us make sure that this campaign has what it needs going into the debates next month.**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jUkDf0yk_Fhlaffi-2uHGZMy7vA0I2giwH01G63GTJD1oVi0U1fdV24kURP2poEx5NUC0mD2oxZAzIN8k2wLyrKIDqt3wx9LWVzpNR_nYYsaBpB1cP3oqlVdnqsHRhkkYlYtFjRrW3ZFq7lBnSzkoPk&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=2 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") There’s one more interesting thing I want to share with you. The DNC announced the qualifications for the second round of debates, and we couldn’t have asked for better news. The next round requires 2%+ in four polls after the first round of debates, and 130,000 individual donors. If we maintain our strength in the early state polling, we should have no problem hitting the polling target. As for the donor target, our Yang Gang donors have put us well on the way to hitting that second target—**when some other candidates haven’t even hit the 65k for the first debates!** [**We are just getting started. Contribute $5 today to help us keep this momentum.**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jUkDf0yk_Fhlaffi-2uHGZMy7vA0I2giwH01G63GTJD1oVi0U1fdV24kURP2poEx5NUC0mD2oxZAzIN8k2wLyrKIDqt3wx9LWVzpNR_nYYsaHD8pbm6mHau5OtT1AObSnw8pccNIxNny9ixz8TTYczk&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=3 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") Zach Graumann Campaign Manager, Yang2020
---

[ DONATE $10](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jXS7z6B0vQBSFYMqiqGORLM&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=4)

[ DONATE $20](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jdWXtiYd7YoTmFcK-0i3r20&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=5)

[ DONATE $50](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jaBNWLsD3frblJj2FiCYkZw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=6)

**Can you make a donation today?**

Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.

**Join the Yang Gang!**

If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application [here](https://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=7) and someone from our team will reach out.

|
---
Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality.

[Yang2020.com](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=c5dAo5qulKAncvNYjq2uGSZwl_jDGybFpG2O3zBACL4&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=8) | [Twitter](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TqE6xdNTSVfW5RhtXxhMjJ0&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=9) | [Facebook](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iem_nK8ycftXP-O5PmREpZFFJK2fNzInyXSvMk1KZmg&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=10) | [Instagram](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y48vYg4fs9ZaLi2ukqvLwvJQL5wg0UiTTe5otEcf4_Y3&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05302019_zach_update_2&n=11)

Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang.

All rights reserved.
New York, NY
#HumanityFirst

our numbers so far.

We’re still short of hitting our May goal and are asking if you’re able to

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Stop Facebook and Twitter from Silencing Conservatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
Big Tech continues to ban conservative voices from their platforms and I'm working to stop them. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7116288dd216/stop-facebook-and-twitter-from-silencing-conservatives?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| Did you see what Facebook did to black conservative activist Candace Owens a few weeks ago? Blocked her for speaking the truth about the intolerant Left.
---
|
---
| Did you see that Facebook labeled the Nation of Islam’s Louis Farrakhan as a “far-right” figure when they banned him?
---
|
---
| Even conservative actor James Woods was blocked on Twitter for confronting the Left.
---
|
---
| Now, negotiators working on the United States Mexico Canada Agreement (USMCA) are working to codify Big Tech’s ability to censor conservatives.

I’ve had enough and it’s time to do something about this ideological censorship.

[I’m circulating a letter among my colleagues in Congress](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=2a85fa2b92&e=7ca82c1e3d) to the U.S. Trade Representative urging him to remove USMCA Article 19.17 that would enshrine technology companies’ legal immunity from Section 230 of the 1996 Communications Decency Act that allows tech companies to censor on their platforms without significant legal recourse.

[If you support my efforts, I hope you will support me. ](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=8c20d5537d&e=7ca82c1e3d) Join me in this fight for freedom and the protection of conservative voices.
---
| |
---
| Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District
---
| [Donate](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=0cf7e67d9e&e=7ca82c1e3d "Donate")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=986ace08a3&e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| | [](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=217962bfcb&e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| | [](www.drpaulgosar.com)
---
|
---
| Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s message to 2019 graduates of the U.S. Air Force Academy
body:
The 61st graduating class of the United States Air Force Academy in Colorado had a very special guest deliver today’s commencement address. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=898f41b92a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 30, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s message to 2019 graduates of the U.S. Air Force Academy**

**The 61 st ****graduating class** of the United States Air Force Academy in Colorado had a very special guest deliver today’s commencement address: their Commander-in-Chief.
**🎬****Watch:** [President Trump thanks 2019 U.S. Air Force Academy graduates](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=788c059ab0&e=3ee4985eea)
**“You could have chosen** any school, any career you wanted, but you chose a harder path and a higher calling to protect and defend the United States of America,” President Donald J. Trump told the group of nearly 1,000 cadets. “You know what—in the end, it’s better.”

“**You are ready** to fly, fight—and win! Always win.”

[Watch the President’s full speech here](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8dfb6f73f0&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: The First Lady visits Tokyo’s Digital Art Museum **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=940d8127b0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **During her visit** with President Trump to Tokyo last weekend, First Lady Melania Trump accompanied Japanese First Lady Akie Abe on a special tour through the teamLab Borderless Exhibit at the Mori Building Digital Art Museum.

**The museum** itself is a unique cultural experience made up of colorful and interactive exhibits. Mrs. Trump is now the first American First Lady to see it in person.

**“Mrs. Abe is a wonderful host** and it is great to be back in Tokyo, exploring more of this wonderful city,” the First Lady said during her visit.

[In photos: First Lady Melania Trump visits Akasaka Palace with Mrs. Abe ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0dc54c4013&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **First Lady Melania Trump meets with schoolchildren creating Be Best artwork during her tour of the teamLab Borderless Exhibit at the Mori Building Digital Art Museum in Tokyo** | May 26, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e075321c98&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f977d7326&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a4dda75f14)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:

| | No frills, no gimmicks, no stunts -- I'm asking plainly:

_**[The Democratic Party just announced I need 130,000 donations to qualify for the September debate. I 'm humbly asking for $15 to ensure I make the cut. It's so critical, a dedicated group of donors agreed to match your generous gift until my 24-hour deadline. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd3c/3eb3e2fc/40ccb59b/74497462/842315023/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190530_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")**_

When I first entered this race, the press counted me out.

The establishment said I was a longshot.

The far right said people like me could never be President.

But what they didn't realize is that I had the toughest, most powerful grassroots supporters on my side.

**You helped an underdog kid from an immigrant family blow past all expectations, work our way to the front of the pack, and prove them all wrong.**

I have no doubt we can defy the odds one more time.

So I'm humbly asking: Can I count on your $15 before my End of Month Deadline in 24 hours to make the cut for this critical debate?

clean_body: | | | | | | | No frills, no gimmicks, no stunts -- I'm asking plainly: "" When I first entered this race, the press counted me out. The establishment said I was a longshot. The far right said people like me could never be President. But what they didn't realize is that I had the toughest, most powerful grassroots supporters on my side. You helped an underdog kid from an immigrant family blow past all expectations, work our way to the front of the pack, and prove them all wrong. I have no doubt we can defy the odds one more time. So I'm humbly asking: Can I count on your $15 before my End of Month Deadline in 24 hours to make the cut for this critical debate? | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

name: Dan Baer
subject: about Mitch McConnell:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
I know you're getting a lot of emails, but please give me a moment to explain: There's a lot riding on this.
|
---
[ ](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826d4/232dfd1/93ce9bd/62a17a72/1976356333/VEsH/ "https://www.danforcolorado.com")

| | [**I 'm about to ask you for $19. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826d4/232dfd1/93ce9bd/62a17a73/1976356333/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190530_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on") I know you're getting a lot of emails, but please give me a moment to explain:

I am not a career politician. I am running because I'm committed to bringing a fresh voice and vision to our politics. And because I have the experience as a diplomat and education leader to represent Coloradans effectively on day one.

But this is a race that affects all Americans. To win the Senate and oust McConnell, we need to win my race in Colorado. Don't take it from me: CNN, MSNBC, Nate Silver, Politico... everyone agrees that if we can't win here, the path to taking back the Senate becomes dangerously narrow.

**To be blunt: There 's a lot riding on this.**

McConnell has blocked health care. He's blocked legislation that makes it easier to vote. He's blocked laws to keep dark money out of politics. He's systematically attacked a woman's right to choose. The only thing he's actually let pass through his Senate this year? A slew of far-right judges appointed by Donald Trump.

We can't let Mitch McConnell run the Senate for another two years. Even if we restore competence and decency to the White House, we won't be able to repair the damage done without taking back the Senate. And so many Americans will bear the burden.

I'm asking for your help because I know that you share my conviction: We can do better. When we feel like giving up hope, that's when we have to fight ten times harder.

I have an End of Month Fundraising Deadline in 24 hours, and it would mean the world to me to have you on this team, or receive your support again, before we close our books. Can you pitch in $19 or whatever you can today and help me fight for the country we believe in?
| | [**Donate $19 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826d4/232dfd1/93ce9bd/62a17a73/1976356333/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190530_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $25 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826d4/232dfd1/93ce9bd/62a17a70/1976356333/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190530_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $50 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826d4/232dfd1/93ce9bd/62a17a71/1976356333/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190530_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=50&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $100 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826d4/232dfd1/93ce9bd/62a17a76/1976356333/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190530_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=100&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate another amount now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826d4/232dfd1/93ce9bd/62a17a70/1976356333/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190530_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

Thanks,

Dan

|

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: no no no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| | |
No no no, team. We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

[](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-may-midmonth?refcode=EM-053019_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_**[Help Ed reach our $14,000 goal by donating $10 or more before midnight!](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-may-midmonth?refcode=EM-053019_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
If we don't reach our goal by May 31, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And just this week, when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

_**[And that's exactly what Ed is doing every day. Will you stand with Ed today and pitch in $10 or more to help us reach our goal?](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-may-midmonth?refcode=EM-053019_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Warren for President
subject: Can you chip in before tomorrow's deadline?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
She's in this fight to level the playing field for working people, and she's got a plan to make it happen. But we can only make these big ideas happen if we have a grassroots movement behind them. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5b9/45c30650/96e1d121/66985c12/1604954641/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Earlier today, Elizabeth went on _The View_ and talked about a few of her plans for big, structural change.

Like Universal Child Care, canceling student loan debt for 95% of Americans who've got it, making sure the wealthiest top 0.1% pay their fair share, and helping close the racial wealth gap.

And she announced new tools on our website that will help show people how much of their student loan debt would be cancelled and how much they'd save on child care.

Now, we need Elizabeth's bold ideas to become reality!

**But we can only make these big ideas happen if we have a grassroots movement behind them.

[This May fundraising deadline is our next big test. So we have to ask: Can you chip in for the first time before midnight tomorrow?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5b9/45c30650/96e1d121/66985c15/1604954641/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMwZW0zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190530em3-full")**

Elizabeth is only counting on grassroots donors like you to fund this campaign.

That's how you'll always know who she's fighting for.

Elizabeth doesn't raise money at swanky private fundraisers, where hedge fund guys could try to pull her aside and bend her ear about a tax loophole they'd love to make even looser.

She doesn't take a dime from federal lobbyists or PACs, who'd have a couple of favors to ask for come January 2021.

She doesn't beg billionaires to dump buckets of cash into a Super PAC for her.

**She 's in this fight to level the playing field for working people, and she's got a plan to make it happen.

But it's only possible with grassroots donations. So first, we need to crush this fundraising goal. That's the only way we can keep making the investments in organizing we need to win.

[Please make a contribution before tomorrow's deadline to help strengthen and grow our movement for big, structural change.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5b9/45c30650/96e1d121/66985c15/1604954641/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMwZW0zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190530em3-full")**

Thanks,

Team Warren
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5b9/45c30650/96e1d121/66985c15/1604954641/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMwZW0zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190530em3-full")

name: Tina Smith
subject: If you care about keeping this Senate seat in Democratic hands, I need you to read this right now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Running out of time.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190530_em-2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") This is urgent, friend. GOP big money and attack ads are pouring in against us, and with control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court on the line, I'm getting very nervous. Right now, I am far short of our May fundraising goal -- which means I don't have the resources I need to fight back and defend my seat. **We have one more chance to close this fundraising gap before we have to make big budget cuts, and that 's why I'm coming to you now:** **[Will you rush a contribution of $10 to my re-election campaign right now? Our huge end-of-month deadline is tomorrow, and with Republican attacks against me and the fate of the Senate at stake, we can't afford to cut back.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190530_em-2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** This seat is critical to taking back the U.S. Senate from Mitch McConnell and ensuring Republicans don't get one more seat on the bench for their extreme, right-wing appointees. If the GOP succeeds at turning this seat red, there'll be no chance for Democrats to take back the Senate, more judges and anti-choice Supreme Court appointments for Donald Trump, and what could be the deciding vote to strip millions of Americans of their health care. **Friend, will you sit on the sidelines and risk all of that happening -- or will you step up right now?** **[Click here to make an urgent contribution before tomorrow's key deadline. Every dollar you give will go into growing our team, expanding our field operation, and reaching voters across the state -- and I'm counting on you to give as much as you can right now.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190530_em-2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Let's do this, Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190530_em-2-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
